chunks.title: Exhortation to Treasure Wisdom
chunks.reason: Direct address to the son urging him to internalize instruction to avoid the foreign woman.

chunks.title: The Story of the Adulteress and the Simple Man
chunks.reason: A narrative account of a young man being lured by a seductive woman to his destruction.

chunks.title: Conclusion and Warning
chunks.reason: The father summarizes the story's lesson and warns against following her ways to death.
